# 🧠 Data & AI

> Data engineering, analytics, machine learning, and applied AI systems.

**14 agents** · [← Back to all categories](../../README.md)

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/build-index.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

| Agent | What it does | Model | Tags |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`ai-engineer`](ai-engineer.md) | Builds LLM- and ML-powered product features and the pipelines behind them, with evaluation baked in from the first commit. | 🔴 opus | llm, ai-features, evals, rag |
| [`analytics-engineer`](analytics-engineer.md) | Models the data warehouse with dbt and owns the metrics/semantic layer — the trusted, tested transformations between raw data and analysis. | 🟡 sonnet | dbt, semantic-layer, data-modeling, sql |
| [`computer-vision-engineer`](computer-vision-engineer.md) | Builds computer-vision systems — image/video classification, object detection, segmentation, OCR, and tracking — from data through deployment. | 🔴 opus | computer-vision, object-detection, segmentation, ocr |
| [`data-analytics-reporter`](data-analytics-reporter.md) | Builds dashboards and KPI reporting that drive decisions, not vanity walls of charts. | 🟡 sonnet | dashboards, kpis, reporting, bi |
| [`data-engineer`](data-engineer.md) | Builds reliable data pipelines and lakehouse architecture — ingestion, ETL/ELT, batch and streaming — that other teams can trust. | 🟡 sonnet | etl, spark, dbt, airflow |
| [`data-remediation-engineer`](data-remediation-engineer.md) | Detects, classifies, and fixes data-quality anomalies at scale — duplicates, nulls, inconsistencies, broken references, and silent corruption. | 🟡 sonnet | data-quality, cleansing, deduplication, validation |
| [`data-scientist`](data-scientist.md) | Turns data into defensible insight through exploratory analysis, statistical modeling, and experiment design. | 🟡 sonnet | statistics, analysis, experimentation, modeling |
| [`llm-rag-engineer`](llm-rag-engineer.md) | Designs retrieval-augmented generation systems end to end — chunking, embeddings, vector search, reranking, and measured retrieval quality. | 🔴 opus | rag, embeddings, vector-search, retrieval |
| [`ml-engineer`](ml-engineer.md) | Develops, trains, and deploys machine-learning models into production serving — feature engineering, training loops, evaluation, and inference. | 🔴 opus | machine-learning, training, pytorch, feature-engineering |
| [`mlops-engineer`](mlops-engineer.md) | Builds the infrastructure that gets models to production and keeps them healthy — training/serving pipelines, model registry, monitoring, and CI/CD for ML. | 🟡 sonnet | mlops, ci-cd, model-registry, monitoring |
| [`model-qa-specialist`](model-qa-specialist.md) | Independently audits ML and LLM models before and after deployment — replicating results, probing calibration and fairness, stress-testing robustness, and checking monitoring. | 🔴 opus | model-audit, calibration, fairness, robustness |
| [`nlp-engineer`](nlp-engineer.md) | Builds NLP pipelines — named-entity recognition, text classification, information extraction, and embeddings — over real, messy text. | 🟡 sonnet | nlp, ner, text-classification, information-extraction |
| [`prompt-engineer`](prompt-engineer.md) | Designs, evaluates, and optimizes prompts as testable, versioned artifacts — not one-off strings. | 🟡 sonnet | prompting, llm, evals, optimization |
| [`recommendation-systems-engineer`](recommendation-systems-engineer.md) | Builds recommenders and ranking/personalization systems — candidate generation, scoring, ranking, and the feedback loops that make them better or worse over time. | 🔴 opus | recommenders, ranking, personalization, collaborative-filtering |
